description: AI project architect: evidence-backed architecture decisions, creative direction, domain-aware stack selection, and Superpowers-ready handoffs. Automatically classifies project domains (medical, finance, gaming, etc.) and recommends the right tech stack.

defaultPrompt: I have a project idea and need help deciding what to build and which tech stack to use.
Help me turn this idea into an implementation-ready architecture plan.
Review my project architecture and identify gaps in evidence, verification, and CI.
I want to start a new project — help me figure out the best approach.
interface.longDescription: Project Forge v1.0 adds a Creative Director, AI Architect, and Domain Classifier to the front of any coding workflow. It classifies your project idea into a domain (medical, finance, gaming, mini-program, etc.), asks domain-specific questions, researches evidence, compares architecture options, writes ADRs, generates harness contracts, and exports Superpowers-ready handoff packets.
interface.shortDescription: AI project architect with domain-aware stack selection and creative direction.

name: project-forge
